description: Canonical OpenAlex search intents for broad-lane thematic harvests. Use these strings (or equivalent filters) when expanding the merged corpus; dedupe against seed, one-hop, and existing merged-lane work IDs.
updated_note: Prefer title.search, publication_year, is_paratext:false, and mailto= on API calls per OpenAlex guidelines.

queries.label: AI + education
queries.summary: Artificial intelligence in education, AIED, intelligent tutoring, and GenAI/LLM-in-education surveys not already covered by seeds.
queries.openalex_search: ("artificial intelligence" AND education) OR "AI in education" OR AIED OR ("intelligent tutoring" AND survey)

queries.label: AI + learning engineering
queries.summary: Scholarly works that explicitly connect learning engineering as a field or practice with AI, machine learning, or foundation models (often low yield—post-filter for IEEE/ICICLE/LAK/L@S relevance).
queries.openalex_search: "learning engineering" AND ("artificial intelligence" OR "machine learning" OR "large language model" OR generative OR "foundation model")
queries.notes: Yields few items; consider supplementing with venue-filtered harvest (Learning@Scale, ICICLE-adjacent proceedings) and manual registry alignment.

queries.label: LLMs in education
queries.summary: Large language models, chatbots, and generative AI in teaching, learning, assessment, and classroom or LMS workflows—including surveys, design patterns, risks, and efficacy studies.
queries.openalex_search: ("large language model" OR LLM OR ChatGPT OR "generative AI") AND (education OR classroom OR "higher education" OR assessment OR tutoring OR "learning outcome")
queries.notes: Dedupe against seed/one-hop (many LLM-education surveys are already cited). Prefer venue-tagged follow-ups and empirical classroom studies.
